expected_values.accident_circumstances: I WAS STATIONARY AT JNC WAITING TO JOIN THE HIGH STREET WHEN T/P FAILED TO STOP AND REAR ENDED MY VEHICLE

notes: Regression fixture for the CDQ claimant/defendant questionnaire claim form (collisionspike TKT-022, the Cheema textbox-drawn .docx). Every value must come from the CLAIMANT section, never the Defendant's (the live failure took the defendant's colour fragment as the model and a questionnaire prompt as the name); the leading-dash value convention is stripped; the layout names NO work provider (sender context fills it), so work_provider/reference are expected EMPTY rather than junk.
